summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MatchImovel admin features including Email SMTP, Dashboard Analytics, Curator Match Visibility, Auto-refresh, and Follow-up CRM flow. All 14 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified successfully.

minor.issue: JWT key is 26 bytes, below recommended 32 bytes minimum for SHA256 (warning in logs)

issues: ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchFollowups' - not critical but should be fixed

action_items: Consider increasing JWT_SECRET to 32+ bytes for security best practices
Fix ESLint warning in MatchFollowUp.js (add fetchFollowups to useEffect dependency array)
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-refresh implemented correctly at 30s intervals in both AdminDashboard.js and AnalyticsDashboard.js
Match visibility logic correctly filters by curator_id for non-admin users
SMTP integration working - emails sent successfully to Titan Email
Follow-up CRM system fully functional with contact types and history
Analytics endpoint returns comprehensive metrics including curator/agent performance
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - 4 buyers, 5 agents, 8 matches, 1 curator
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features requested are working. Backend has 14 passing tests covering: API health, admin auth, analytics endpoint, curator creation, match visibility, follow-ups. Frontend verified: admin login, dashboard stats, Analytics tab, create curator modal, matches tab, follow-up CRM with submit.

email_smtp.details: Email successfully sent via smtp.titan.email:587, logs confirm delivery

dashboard_analytics.details: All analytics metrics displayed: overview, matches, followups, curator/agent performance, distributions, price ranges

match_visibility.details: Admin sees all 8 matches, curator sees only 1 match (their curated match)

auto_refresh.details: 30-second auto-refresh implemented in AdminDashboard.js and AnalyticsDashboard.js

curation_followup_flow.details: Follow-up CRM working: contact type selection, content input, submit, history display
